content.full_text:
November 16, 2006

Brenda Johnson
1426 Rama Drive
Valinda, CA 91746

Re: Your Letter of October 14, 2006
Our File No. W-06-203

Dear Ms. Johnson:

Thank you for your letter of October 14, 2006, regarding a mass mailing which was sent to Bassett Unified School District voters earlier this month.

Your correspondence and a copy of the mailing has been forwarded to the Enforcement Division of the Fair Political Practices Commission for review of the question you presented. You will be advised by the Enforcement Division of their determination at a future date.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
